nodes.label: AI as task automator for disliked tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really enjoy writing them myself and feel like I can never do it well so often I will only make tiny edits to AI-generated captions

nodes.label: AI as source of misinformation
nodes.grounding_span: AI can't always do that well, so in that case I find it more efficient for me to write the content from scratch

nodes.label: AI requiring complex prompting techniques
nodes.label_negative: AI as unresponsive to simple prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I now know that it can handle much more complex prompts, and that these complex prompts often give me higher-quality responses

nodes.label: Trust in AI for client communication
nodes.label_negative: Direct client-AI interaction without human mediator
nodes.grounding_span: It's interesting being a 'mediator' between my clients and AI

nodes.label: AI as threat to copywriter job demand
nodes.label_negative: AI as complement to copywriter skills
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry that copywriters will be less in-demand because of AI

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: I'm also interested in learning more about how I can use AI for productivity, as well - like if AI can help me manage my schedule or respond to messages and emails

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and enjoyment of writing
nodes.grounding_span: I really like writing so I often prefer to do that myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I find it more efficient for me to write the content from scratch

nodes.label: Accuracy and factual reliability
nodes.grounding_span: AI can't always do that well, so in that case I find it more efficient for me to write the content from scratch and reference what I want

nodes.label: Professional competence and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: I've considered shifting into grant writing, which is a more specific and responsive area of writing that I don't think AI will become big in

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for captions
nodes.grounding_span: I was very thankful for AI in that moment

nodes.label: Frustration with research AI
nodes.grounding_span: it didn't really find me anything useful

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry that copywriters will be less in-demand because of AI

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm also interested in learning more about how I can use AI for productivity

nodes.label: Proactive skill diversification
nodes.grounding_span: I've considered shifting into grant writing, which is a more specific and responsive area of writing that I don't think AI will become big in

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: When I first started using AI I would just prompt it with things like, 'Write me a magazine-style article about...' but I now know that it can handle much more complex prompts
